title: The Artisan's Garden
description: Combination of Factorio and Stardew Valley
body:
Immerse yourself in a world where engineering ingenuity meets agricultural artistry.

The Artisan's Garden combines the mechanical marvels of the Create mod with the bountiful beauty of Farmer’s Delight to deliver a unique gameplay experience. Build intricate machines, craft automated farming systems, and enjoy the satisfaction of cultivating thriving gardens alongside efficient contraptions.

Key features include:

Creative Engineering: Harness the power of Create to design automated systems for crafting, farming, and resource gathering. Build everything from massive windmills to conveyor belts and precision factories.
Bountiful Farming: Explore Farmer's Delight to grow and harvest a variety of crops, prepare delicious meals, and enhance your survival experience.
Seamless Integration: Experience how farming and engineering intertwine, with mods like Create Deco, Sophisticated Backpacks, and Storage Drawers to organize and enhance your builds.
Adventurous Exploration: Traverse stunning landscapes powered by Terralith and discover improved structures with YUNG’s Better Mods.
Quality of Life Enhancements: Enjoy smoother gameplay with mods like Mouse Tweaks, FastQuit, and Dynamic FPS, ensuring a polished experience.
Whether you dream of running a bustling automated farm, crafting intricate factory systems, or simply relaxing in a picturesque garden, The Artisan's Garden has something for everyone.

Forge your masterpiece—one seed, one gear, one block at a time.

[List of mods](https://torch-cardigan-04d.notion.site/Minecraft-create-2k25-178ac0d4a3ab8067b76cf8477b3c2e4b)
